title: HIVE Digital Technologies Exceeds 12 EH/s Milestone (Retransmission)
text: HIVE Digital Technologies announced it has doubled its Bitcoin mining capacity to 12 exahash per second (EH/s) since the start of 2025 and reached a $250 million annualized revenue run rate. The company attributes this growth to rapid expansion of its Paraguay facilities. The organization is constructing three hydro-powered data center campuses in Yguazú, Paraguay. Phase 2 deployment is underway with next-generation Bitmain S21+ miners, expected to reach 6.5 EH/s by late August. Leadership projects reaching 18 EH/s by summer's end and 25 EH/s by Thanksgiving 2025. Executive leadership highlighted operational efficiency gains. CEO Aydin Kilic stated the company is mining over 6 BTC daily across global Bitcoin operations with approximately 55% mining margins. Projections suggest that at 18 EH/s capacity, annual run rate revenue could reach approximately $400 million with mining margins approaching 60%. The Paraguay project has generated local employment and community benefits, including street lighting improvements and school air conditioning installations.
